name: Network Scan Detector
description: Detects horizontal port scanning (Nmap sweeps) across the LAN.

documentation.summary: The Network Scan Detector identifies compromised internal machines performing horizontal port scans. By silently tracking SYN packets on the network interface, it catches internal Nmap sweeps before they map out the local network.

sections.title: Features
content: Threshold-Based Detection: Configurable scan detection parameters for noisy environments.
Intelligent Filtering: Automatically ignores legitimate internal services to prevent false positives.
Source Tracking: Logs internal attacker IP addresses and precise scan patterns.

sections.title: Security Architecture
content: Global Sandbox Baseline: Enforced by the HoneyWire Hub. Drops ALL default Linux kernel capabilities, enforces a read-only filesystem, and applies strict log rotation.
Execution Privilege: Runs as container root (UID 0) strictly to initialize the raw network socket.
Required Capabilities: Adds 'NET_RAW' to allow deep packet-level inspection of TCP headers.

heuristics.recommendation_reason: Core Network Sensor, tracks stealthy subnet mapping. Might generate false positives in noisy environments.

env_vars.name: HW_HUB_ENDPOINT
env_vars.description: The URL of your central HoneyWire Hub.

env_vars.name: HW_SENSOR_ID
env_vars.description: Unique identifier for this specific trap.

env_vars.name: HW_SEVERITY
env_vars.description: Alert severity sent to the Hub.

env_vars.name: HW_SCAN_THRESHOLD
env_vars.description: Number of ports that must be scanned to trigger detection. Highly anomalous packets (e.g. NULL/XMAS scans) bypass this threshold.

env_vars.name: HW_SCAN_WINDOW
env_vars.description: Time window in seconds for scan detection.

env_vars.name: HW_IGNORE_LOCALHOST
env_vars.description: Ignore scans originating from the host machine (loopback interface). Disabling this might generate false positives on noisy host environments.

env_vars.name: HW_IGNORE_PORTS
env_vars.description: Comma-separated list of ports to exclude from scan detection.
